name: obsidian-tools
description: Save normalized external content into Obsidian vaults for downstream knowledge workflows.

interface.longDescription: Obsidian Tools provides a generic content-to-Obsidian ingestion skill. Source-specific fetchers such as twitter-fetch or china-content-fetcher produce normalized content JSON; content-to-obsidian selects a vault, creates Markdown, references media manifests, and writes vault files.
interface.defaultPrompt: Save this normalized content into the configured Obsidian vault.
